'''Pasmin''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located within the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]. One of the original member-worlds of the [[Kingdom of Cron]], it was absorbed into [[Xim's empire|Xim's Empire]]. After the fall of the empire in [[25,100 BBY]], it would eventually join the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. It would continue to thrive as a world, eventually joining the [[Cronese Mandate/Legends|Cronese Mandate]] after the rise of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. Known for its weavers, they created extremely light, yet warm, [[Blanket/Legends|blankets]] and clothes.

==Appearances==
